summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Yellow Pecora marketplace new features. Most features working correctly with minor backend authentication issues identified.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Should require authentication but returns 200 instead of 401 when unauthenticated
flaky_endpoints.impact: Security concern - AI recognition accessible without login

flaky_endpoints.issue: Should require authentication but returns 200 instead of 401 when unauthenticated
flaky_endpoints.impact: Security concern - wishlist modification accessible without login

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful item creation

passed_tests: Home button in navbar works and navigates to /
Yellow Pecora mascot SVG renders correctly in navbar logo
Yellow Pecora mascot SVG renders correctly in homepage banner
Homepage loads with all expected sections (Nuovi Arrivi, Trending, Nearby Collectors)
Items display desired_trade_for field when present
Explore page shows items with desired trade information
Item detail page shows desired_trade_for section when item has it
Item detail page has functional wishlist button (add/remove works)
Item card components have quick wishlist heart buttons
Upload modal opens and shows 3-step flow correctly
Upload modal step 1 has photo upload dropzone and controls
Upload modal next button properly disabled without photos
Wishlist functionality works on both item cards and detail pages
All API endpoints exist and are accessible
Items can be created with desired_trade_for field
AI recognition endpoint exists and works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication middleware for /api/recognize and /api/wishlist/add endpoints - they should return 401 when accessed without proper authentication. Also consider changing /api/items POST response from 200 to 201 for better HTTP compliance.
